nodes.name: Gmail — Watch Inbox
nodes.notes: Polls every minute for new emails. Free self-hosted n8n — no execution limits.

parameters.subject: =🔥 HOO REPLY: {{ $json.lead.business }}

_meta.description: HOO Gmail Reply Detector — polls every minute, matches sender to lead JSON, updates pipeline stage to responded, alerts Matthew immediately.
_meta.install: 1. Import this JSON into n8n (New Workflow → Import). 2. Connect your Gmail account under Credentials. 3. Activate workflow. Done — runs 24/7.
